summaryAm: አንዲት ልጃገረድ ብሩህ ስጦታን ከደግ ልብ ጋር ማወዳደር የምትማርበት ተለሳለሰ ታሪክ።
moralAm: የሰውን ልብ ከውጭ ነገር በላይ መመልከት ጥሩ ምርጫ ነው።

source.name: Hans Christian Andersen tale
source.notes: Public-domain source inspiration only. This is an original child-friendly Amharic adaptation with softened themes for ages 3-6.

pages.textAm: አንድ ወጣት በቀላል ልብስ ወደ ቤተመንግሥት መጣ። እሱ ደግ እና ብልህ ነበር።
pages.textEn: A young man in simple clothes came to the palace, kind and clever.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Child-friendly warm storybook illustration for The Swineherd, page 1: አንድ ወጣት በቀላል ልብስ ወደ ቤተመንግሥት መጣ። እሱ ደግ እና ብልህ ነበር።

pages.textAm: ለልጃገረዷ በእጁ የሠራውን ትንሽ የሙዚቃ ማሰሮ ስጦታ አመጣ።
pages.textEn: He brought the princess a small music pot he had made with his own hands.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Warm storybook illustration of a princess looking at a small handmade music pot in a palace room.

pages.textAm: እሷ ግን ብሩህ ነገሮችን ብቻ ማየት ትፈልግ ነበር።
pages.textEn: She wanted to notice only shiny things.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Child-friendly warm storybook illustration for The Swineherd, page 3: እሷ ግን ብሩህ ነገሮችን ብቻ ማየት ትፈልግ ነበር።

pages.textAm: ወጣቱ አሳማዎችን በደግነት ሲንከባከብ ሁሉም እንስሳት ይወዱት ነበር።
pages.textEn: The young man cared kindly for pigs, and all the animals liked him.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Child-friendly warm storybook illustration for The Swineherd, page 4: ወጣቱ አሳማዎችን በደግነት ሲንከባከብ ሁሉም እንስሳት ይወዱት ነበር።

pages.textAm: ልጃገረዷ ወጣቱ እንስሳቱን በርኅራኄ ሲያነጋግር ተመለከተች። ብሩህ ስጦታ ብቻ ሳይሆን ደግ ልብም ሊታይ እንደሚገባ አሰበች።
pages.textEn: The princess watched the young man speak kindly to the animals and began to notice the value of a kind heart.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Child-friendly warm storybook illustration for The Swineherd, page 5: princess watching a kind swineherd gently care for animals near a garden.

pages.textAm: እሷ አበባውን በአትክልት ውስጥ ተከለች። አበባው ቀላል ቢሆንም በየጠዋቱ ሞቃት መዓዛ ይሰጥ ነበር።
pages.textEn: She planted the flower in the garden, and though it was simple, it gave a warm scent each morning.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Child-friendly warm storybook illustration for The Swineherd, page 6: princess planting a simple flower in a palace garden with warm morning light.

pages.textAm: ልጃገረዷ የሙዚቃ ማሰሮውን ሲታይ ድምፁን ወደደች፣ ግን ከነገሩ በላይ የሠራውን ደግ ልብ ማየት እንዳለባት አስታወሰች።
pages.textEn: The princess liked the music pot, then remembered to notice the kind heart that made it.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Princess thoughtfully listening to a small handmade music pot and remembering the kind heart behind it.

pages.textAm: በአጥር አጠገብ ወጣቱ አሳማዎቹን በስም ይጠራቸው ነበር። እነሱም በደስታ ወደ እሱ ይሮጡ ነበር።
pages.textEn: By the fence, the young man called the pigs by name and cared for them kindly.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Kind swineherd calling happy pigs by a fence near the palace garden.

pages.textAm: ልጃገረዷ ከመስኮት ይህን አይታ ተገረመች። “እንስሳት ደግነትን ፈጥነው ያውቃሉ” ብላ አሰበች።
pages.textEn: The princess watched and noticed that animals quickly know kindness.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Princess watching from a palace window as pigs gather around the kind swineherd.

pages.textAm: በኋላ ወጣቱ ለአሳማዎቹ ትንሽ የሙዚቃ መጫወቻ ሠራ። ድምፁ ቀላል ነበር፣ ግን ሁሉንም እንዲደሰቱ አደረገ።
pages.textEn: Later, he made a simple music toy that made everyone happy.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Swineherd playing a simple music toy while pigs and children listen happily.

pages.textAm: ልጃገረዷ አበባውን እንደገና ተመለከተች። “ብሩህ ነገር ዓይንን ያስደስታል፣ ደግ ልብ ግን ቤትን ያሞቃል” ብላ ተማረች።
pages.textEn: The princess looked again at the flower and understood the warmth of a kind heart.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Princess holding a simple flower warmly in a palace garden.
